name: Big settlement mistakes to avoid after work chem exposure?
description: No early settlement, get lawyer review first.

mainEntity.name: Big settlement mistakes to avoid after work chem exposure?

acceptedAnswer.text: No early settlement, get lawyer review first.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Don't accept first offer, sign nothing without review, or miss appeal deadlines.** Insurers lowball chronic cases.[1][6] Key factors: undervalue latency risks, ignore future care. Get written projections, lawyer review; wait for max med improvement. Preserve all rights long-term.
